title: Specklinia latilabris
taxonomy: Specklinia latilabris is a species of orchid in the genus Specklinia. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant is also classified as belonging to the tribe Maxillarieae. Specklinia latilabris is further classified as belonging to the subtribe Maxillardiinae. It is a part of the subfamily Epidendroideae.
uses: Specklinia latilabris has been traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in its native regions of Central and South America. The health benefits of Specklinia latilabris include its potential to help regulate blood sugar levels, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a popular choice for natural remedies. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
